mapper.sql: id, grammar_point_id, question_type, question, options, answer, explanation, difficulty, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT ge.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_grammar_exercises ge LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_EXERCISE' AND sr.content_id = ge.id
ORDER BY ge.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_grammar_exercises ge LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_EXERCISE' AND sr.content_id = ge.id
SELECT FROM ielts_grammar_exercises WHERE grammar_point_id = #{grammarPointId,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY difficulty, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_grammar_exercises (id, grammar_point_id, question_type, question, options, answer, explanation, difficulty, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{grammarPointId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{questionType}, #{question}, #{options}, #{answer}, #{explanation}, #{difficulty}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_grammar_exercises SET grammar_point_id = #{grammarPointId,jdbcType=OTHER}, question_type = #{questionType}, question = #{question}, options = #{options}, answer = #{answer}, explanation = #{explanation}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_grammar_exercises (id, grammar_point_id, question_type, question, options, answer, explanation, difficulty, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{e.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{e.grammarPointId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{e.questionType}, #{e.question}, #{e.options}, #{e.answer}, #{e.explanation}, #{e.difficulty}, #{e.createdAt}, #{e.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT ge.* FROM ielts_grammar_exercises ge WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_EXERCISE' AND sr.content_id = ge.id ) ORDER BY ge.difficulty, ge.id LIMIT #{limit}
